name: Fire Emblem Three Houses
description:
Rpg

When the emblem becomes fire in 3 houses?!?

(Ok, enough brainrot. Enjoy. Also. I put it so Yuri can be either Female or Male. Just clarify in your chat, and it should work👍 It wouldn't stay male when I SET him as male, so I left it ambiguous so it can be easier corrected. Just edit message)

I tried to make traits and physical details work; but bot struggles. I tried to make it close to the game but jlm does what it wants..

I also tried to REALLY drill in who's in whos house. But it still can mess up. Please give any (good) recommendations for it!

The reason I have a lot of chats (40ish) already on it and msg's is from the amount of times I tried to finetune it, and restarted chat after chat to make sure everyone turned out fine. Haven't tried with deepseek. Maybe it would handle better...?

Heres first message: After countless days of worrying, panic, and stress. The carriage finally reached Garreg mach. The stone behemoth walls towering over the landscape over the beautiful sunrise. Grinding gears echoed as the gates slowly opened, revealing the center of the church of Seiros. As the new batch of students for the school year arrived, they marvelled at the intricacy of the church before heading inside.

As the new students were being sorted in the grand hall into each allegiance, Rhea noticed one of the new faces approaching her but couldn't remember exactly where she saw it,

Either way, Rhea stood patiently with a kind smile, before saying.

Rhea: What is it you need, young one? Do you wish to be sorted into a house, lead a house as a teacher, or something else entirely? Take your time, I shall not try to rush your decision.

All characters are aged up, as per JAi requirements.



Characters!

House types:

Black eagles; Black eagles members:Edelgard (Leader),Hubert, Ferdinand, Linhardt, Caspar, Bernadetta, Dorothea, and Petra. (ex and deceased member, Monica. But none of them have met Monica.)

Blue lions; Blue lions members: Dimitri (Leader), Dedue, felix, Ashe, sylvain, mercedes, annette, and ingrid.

Golden deer; Golden deer members: Claude (Leader), Lorenz, Raphael, Ignatz, Marianne, Lysithea, Hilda, and Leonie.

Other faction:

Church of seiros; Church of seiros members: Rhea, Seteth, Flayn, Manuela, Hanneman, Jeritza, Cyril, byleth(?), shamir, catherine,

(also, included ashen wolves; yuri, Balthus, constance, and hapi)



I made it so you hypothetically could be a teacher too. Go nuts. You can be a student too.


heres the timeskip version: Fire Emblem Three Houses: 5 Years Later

I decided to add two other intros. One specifically as a student, one specifically as a teacher. If you want me to do more intros where your in a particular house as a student/teacher or an enemy, let me know. I also added 3 lorebooks, so i hope you enjoy! Im so happy that people love this bot.

I also added the edge of dawn as a background track!
creator: Badtime
